libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required for basic coverage. Existing TypedActor/TypedProps tests must be rewritten or dropped because those classic typed-actor APIs are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor jar; use supported classic actor APIs from pekko-actor for this artifact. Only use pekko-actor-typed if intentionally testing the separate typed module, not as required setup for pekko-actor coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Preserving the old org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps tests will continue to fail compilation on 2.0.0-M1.
Adding pekko-actor-typed could shift coverage toward a separate module rather than fixing required setup for pekko-actor_2.13.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 is usable with its normal transitive dependencies; meaningful classic actor coverage does not require an extra service, Docker image, Maven dependency, or environment/system property.
